name: Capstone Copper Corp.
analysis: CSC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$15.0500, stop A$12.6522, target A$17.1000 (0.85:1) — then trail it.
